common.create_workspace_description: Create a workspace to organize your team, projects, and planning data.
common.create_workspace_upgrade_notice: Workspace limits depend on your current plan.
common.join_workspace_by_slug_description: Enter a workspace slug to request access or accept an invitation.
common.report-problem-description: Tell us what happened and include any helpful context.

ai.artifactsInTools: Generated plans and draft controls are available in the artifacts below.
ai.attachmentOnlyPrompt: Use the attached files as context for this mindboard.
ai.creditWorkspaceLocked: Workspace credits are locked for this board.
ai.empty: Ask Mind to expand the graph, consolidate duplicate plans, or turn rough ideas into structured patches.
ai.placeholder: Ask for a refinement, expansion, merge, or long-range planning pass

consolidate.description: Cluster duplicate ideas and simplify the graph structure.
consolidate.title: Consolidate

expand.description: Grow this board into the next concrete planning horizon.
expand.title: Expand horizon

risks.description: Find weak assumptions, missing dependencies, and unclear paths.
risks.title: Find gaps

ai.promptConsolidate: Find overlapping ideas and propose a cleaner structure.
ai.promptExpand: Expand this board into the next concrete planning horizon.
ai.promptRisks: Surface weak assumptions and missing dependencies.
ai.proposalInIsland: Generated plan and draft controls are shown in the proposal island.
ai.selectBoard: Select or create a board first
ai.subtitle: AI sees compact board context and can load graph chunks or propose patches.
ai.title: AI iteration
ai.toolSummaryDone: {count, plural, one {# action} other {# actions}} done
ai.toolSummaryErrors: {count, plural, one {# action error} other {# action errors}}
ai.toolSummaryRunning: {count, plural, one {# action running} other {# actions running}}
ai.writeModeDescription: Draft proposals or implement graph changes

mind.boardLoadErrorDescription: Mind could not reach the board API. Retry, or check the API logs if it keeps failing.
mind.emptyBoards: No boards in this workspace yet.

emptyState.description: Create a board to begin mapping ideas, plans, horizons, and relationships in this workspace.
emptyState.sidebarHint: Create a board from the sidebar.
emptyState.title: Start the first mindboard

inspector.empty: Select a node or relationship to edit its details.

smartPrompts.actions: For node "{title}" ({id}), status {status}, horizon {horizon}, propose an applyable draft that turns this idea into actionable child nodes with clear statuses, dependencies, and next steps. Use the node body as context: {body}
smartPrompts.elaborate: Elaborate node "{title}" ({id}), status {status}, horizon {horizon}, into smaller connected idea nodes. Smartly determine the right timeframe for each child, preserve the parent relationship, color-code the structure, and propose an applyable draft patch. Node body: {body}
smartPrompts.expandSystem: Treat node "{title}" ({id}) as the seed of a larger planning system. Inspect nearby graph context, identify missing branches, milestones, risks, review points, and actionable follow-ups, then propose an applyable draft patch with sensible statuses and horizons. Current status: {status}. Current horizon: {horizon}. Node body: {body}
smartPrompts.refine: Refine node "{title}" ({id}) by deduplicating overlaps, improving wording, clarifying relationships, and proposing any needed child nodes or relationship rewrites as an applyable draft. Status: {status}. Horizon: {horizon}. Body: {body}
smartPrompts.refineEdge: Inspect relationship {edgeId} from "{source}" ({sourceId}) to "{target}" ({targetId}). Current type: {edgeType}. Current label: {label}. Decide whether this should be a parent-child, sequence, dependency, blocker, support, reference, or loose relation, then propose an applyable draft with any needed edge type, label, source, target, or parent updates.
smartPrompts.relationshipPass: Run a relationship clarity pass for board "{board}" with {nodes} nodes and {edges} edges. Inspect the graph, identify parent-child structure, same-level sequence, dependencies, blockers, supports, and loose relations. Propose an applyable draft that rewrites confusing links, labels important edges, groups children under parents, and removes redundant relationship noise.
smartPrompts.relationships: For node "{title}" ({id}), analyze its relationship structure. Incoming: {incoming}. Outgoing: {outgoing}. Related nodes: {related}. Status: {status}. Horizon: {horizon}. Body: {body}. Propose an applyable draft that clarifies parent-child placement, same-level links, dependencies, blockers, and support edges around this node.
smartPrompts.rewireEdge: Find a better placement for relationship {edgeId}. Current source: "{source}" ({sourceId}); target: "{target}" ({targetId}); type: {edgeType}; label: {label}. Inspect nearby graph context and propose an applyable draft to rewire or relabel it if that improves the plan.
smartPrompts.risks: Analyze node "{title}" ({id}) for blockers, weak assumptions, missing dependencies, review needs, and decision points. Propose an applyable draft that adds risk, question, dependency, and action nodes with appropriate statuses. Status: {status}. Horizon: {horizon}. Body: {body}

mind.snapshotLoadErrorDescription: The board list loaded, but the selected board snapshot failed.

nav-upgrade-dialog.contact_support: If you require immediate access to this feature, please contact support.
nav-upgrade-dialog.description: The {feature} feature requires a {tier} plan or higher.
nav-upgrade-dialog.rollout_notice: Paid subscriptions are rolling out gradually and are not available everywhere yet.
nav-upgrade-dialog.title: {tier} plan required
